reviews.review_description: Great quality 3d videos. I said Wow several times. I can't wait to see even more locations around the world. I love the views and the sounds in each scene. Too cool.

developer_response.body: Hi! thank you for your review! I tried my best. If you like the other apps, I would be very happy for a review as well. I will do Portugal - Algarve as next (lots of beaches), or Vienna. You can choose a bundle as well, that way you have 4 apps cheaper ;) thanks a lot for the review!

reviews.review_description:
i like this better than brink i mean with this i actually get the feeling that i'm there. with brink you can tell it's been enhanced or altered graphically in some way, but not Visit World.

more things like this please. really like it!

developer_response.body: Hi! I am glad you liked it and I am honoured to be compared with auch a popular app. I hope you will enjoy also the full apps, they are all on sale now ;) As next, I will be working on Algarve, Portugal. But that takes time..

That is why I created a free version, so people can try it out, and if they do not like it, leave it and not spend money on it. I am  a bit disappointed, that despite it is free, you decided to leave a bad review.  If there is something I can do better, please write a more constructive review, with points, what you do not like. This does not help me to move forward, or make the app better.

reviews.review_description: these are the applications that remind me that VR needs enormous evolutions in panel resolution and 360 3D immersive videos. Good experience on Quest 3.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review. I could not agree more. My camera can shoot in 8K, but quest headset can not play anything above 5.7K 360 3D. There is still more potential to unlock. ;)
